docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, CATRY AKA CATHY HUI AS TO DEFENDANT GREER, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-27-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT GREER, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL GREER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MICHAEL GREER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 4, 2009 PENDING DEFENDANT'S COMPLIANCE WITH JUDGE MCBRIDE'S ORDER DATED APRIL 22, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREER, MICHAEL
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT GREER, MICHAEL

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL GREER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT ALSO FINDS THE APPLICATION TO BE INCOMPLETE. MICHAEL GREER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, CATRY AKA CATHY HUI SERVED MAR-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT GREER, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT MICHAEL GREER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO MOVING PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH JUDGE MCBRIDE'S ORDER DATED APRIL 22, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF MICHAEL GREER ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
